alkylation reagent: Free Cys are capped with NEM.
alkylation concentration: NEM (20 mM final concentration, stock solution 1M ethanol)
cleavage agent: the samples (n= 4 biological replicates) were analyzed by nanoLC-MS/MS and quantified by LFQ.
collision energy: Normalized collision energy was set at 27.
enrichment method: we optimized the Neutravidin bead enrichment.
instrument: the liquid chromatography setup was coupled to an Orbitrap XL.
labeling: the label-free MaxLFQ algorithm in Maxquant.
